sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8883" key="a)nqrwpoqu=mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθρωπο-θῦμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8883.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bold as a man,</tr_> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θυμολέων,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.988d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
